theme_rankings.why_now: 토큰 가격은 하락했지만 매출 폭증 중. AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출 직접.
theme_rankings.risk: 토큰 인플레이션 압력 + 사용자 보상 의존. 베어 마켓에서 매도 압력 큼.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🌐 검증된 L1 — 이더 외 실수요 입증된 체인들
theme_rankings.why_now: 솔라나 압도적 점유 + 신흥 L1(Sui·Aptos)도 자금 유입. 생태계 prop value 확보.
theme_rankings.risk: L1 간 경쟁 격화. 사용자·개발자 이탈 시 멀티플 빠르게 축소.

theme_rankings.tagline: 📈 ETF 승인 후보 + 이더 L2 — 기관 매집 영역
theme_rankings.why_now: SOL·LTC ETF 가능성 + L2 거래량 회복. 다음 cycle 메이저 후보.
theme_rankings.risk: ETF 미승인 시 단기 조정. L2는 fee market 경쟁 심화.

theme_rankings.why_now: 실제 매출 + 토큰 보유자 환원. P/S 가시화로 밸류에이션 재평가 단계.
theme_rankings.risk: 스마트컨트랙트 위험 + 규제. 매출은 시장 변동성에 큰 폭으로 변동.

theme_rankings.why_now: 거버넌스보단 실제 트래픽·결제 사용처. TON·BNB 일일 활성 유저 검증.
theme_rankings.risk: 투기 대비 변동성 낮지만 폭발력도 작음. 환희장에서 underperform.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🥇 시장 방향성 기준 — 비트는 디지털 금, 이더는 인프라
theme_rankings.why_now: BTC ETF 자금 유입, ETH 스테이킹 + L2 매출. 알트 사이클의 출발점.
theme_rankings.risk: 거시 유동성·금리에 직접 노출. ETF 자금 흐름이 단기 방향성을 좌우.

theme_rankings.tagline: 🤖 크립토 버전 AI 베팅 — 분산 컴퓨팅·에이전트
theme_rankings.why_now: AI Capex 사이클의 크립토 노출. 미국 AI 주식 테마와 동행 흐름.
theme_rankings.risk: 내러티브 의존도 큼. 실수요 검증 아직 미흡. 알트 변동성 폭.

theme_rankings.why_now: 기관 자금 유입 가장 빠른 영역. BlackRock·Franklin 등 진입.
theme_rankings.risk: 규제 의존적. 거시 금리 환경 변화 시 단기 자금 이탈 가능.

narrative.summary: Akash: 정량 종합 54점, 라벨 HOLD. 단기 57 / 중기 64 / 장기 42. (LLM 미연결 — 정량 요약만 표기)
narrative.entry_guide: API 키 미설정 — 진입 가이드 자동 생성 불가
narrative.risks: LLM 서술 미생성. 정량 점수만 참고할 것

overheat.label: 극과열
overheat.guidance: 회피하거나 차익실현. 지금 진입은 단기 손실 위험 매우 큼.

trade_plan.rationale: 진입 zone에 1개 시그널 합류 — 주봉 50MA. 현재가 대비 +13.4% 위치.
trade_plan.invalidation: 진입가 $0.742 아래 손절가 $0.6957 일봉 종가 마감 시 plan 폐기.

timeframes.note: 가격이 50/200MA 위 + 골든 크로스 · RSI 과매수

multi_tf.note: TF가 align 안 됨 — conviction 낮음, 보수적 사이징.

top_news.title: Gold Holds Decline as Rising US Inflation Raises Rate-Hike Bets
top_news.summary: Gold held a decline as a resurgence in US inflation reinforced bets the Federal Reserve will keep interest rates higher for longer.

top_news.title: Asian Stocks to Climb as Wall Street Hits New High: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: Stocks in Asia were primed to rally Thursday after a US tech rally drove new highs on Wall Street, quelling concerns over inflation that have fueled wagers the Federal Reserve will keep rates higher for longer.

top_news.title: Venezuela Kickstarts $170 Billion Debt Restructuring Process
top_news.summary: Venezuela hired a financial adviser as it launches one of the world’s largest-ever debt restructurings, aiming to rework an estimated $170 billion of defaulted bonds and loans.

top_news.title: Rare Earth Minerals Expected to be Central to Trump, Xi Talks
top_news.summary: Lipi Sternheim, CEO of rare earth mining company REAlloys, said that his company is racing to build infrastructure to mine rare earth minerals in North America to compete with already established supply chains from China. Sternheim said that because US rare earths production won't happen overnight, it is important that president trump secures short term supply during his meeting with President Xi in China.  (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: CommScope Sued by Lenders for at Least $150 Million Over Alleged Breach
top_news.summary: Vistance Networks, formerly known as CommScope Holding Co., was sued by a group of lenders who allege the telecommunications provider breached a debt agreement by failing to pay a prescribed premium of at least $150 million following a key asset sale.

top_news.title: Stocks Get Tech Boost to Hit Fresh All-Time Highs: Markets Wrap
top_news.summary: A rally in technology giants drove stocks to all-time highs, overshadowing data showing a resurgence in inflation that fueled wagers the Federal Reserve will keep rates higher for longer.

top_news.title: Lululemon's Incoming CEO Aims to Get Brand Back on Track
top_news.summary: Lululemon Athletica’s incoming CEO Heidi O’Neill gave her first speech to the company’s employees this week, in which she pledged to put the athleisure brand back on track. Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld have more on "Bloomberg The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: Brazil’s Real Slumps on Report Tying Bolsonaro to Bank Scandal
top_news.summary: Brazil’s currency slumped Wednesday after a news website linked right-wing presidential candidate Flavio Bolsonaro to Daniel Vorcaro, the jailed former chief executive of a bank at the center of a massive fraud probe.

top_news.title: Live Sports are Scarce Asset: Nussbaum
top_news.summary: Ian Nussbaum, partner at Latham & Watkins, joins Dani Burger and Michelle Davis on "Bloomberg Deals." They discuss sports media rights deals and the value of live entertainment to dealmakers. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_news.title: AI Good for Media IP: Citigroup's Mohr
top_news.summary: Christina Mohr, global chair of M&A at Citigroup, and Ian Nussbaum, partner at Latham & Watkins, join Dani Burger and Michelle Davis on "Bloomberg Deals." (Source: Bloomberg)
